title: Hyperliquid Mobile with Dexari, Ex-Binance US
summary_title: Ex-Binance builders launch native mobile app for Hyperliquid trading
summary_description: Dexari brings seamless perpetuals and spot trading to iOS and Android with account abstraction, multi-chain deposits, and integrated staking.

key_moments.label: Dexari introduced as mobile solution for Hyperliquid
Chuck reveals co-founders left Binance US to build Dexari
Discussion of Binance vs Hyperliquid situation last week
Android app just launched; iOS TestFlight available
Hyper-EVM integration on roadmap with DeFi app bundling
Account abstraction enables single USDC balance across chains
Vault integration and fiat on/off ramps planned
Points pre-season retroactively tracking all user activity

pull_quote: Hyperliquid is the first time I've seen a product that rivals what a centralized exchange can do in terms of performance, liquidity, and user experience.
